title: Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital course creator in Pakistan trying to sell your products without getting shut down by Stripe's country restrictions, you're not alone. Many creators face similar hurdles when it comes to PayPal's limited support in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. In this post, we'll explore the options available to you and provide a clear path forward to getting paid for your digital courses without relying on Stripe or PayPal.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for digital creators, but they come with their own set of limitations. PayPal, for instance, restricts access to certain countries, including Pakistan, while Stripe has strict requirements for merchants in countries like Nigeria and Ghana. Gumroad and Payhip, on the other hand, have limitations on the types of products they can sell. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle provides a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard, without any country restrictions or product limitations.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often have strict requirements or outright block creators. PayPal, for example, requires a business account to sell digital products, while Stripe has a limited presence in countries like Nigeria and Ghana. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle is designed to work seamlessly with creators in restricted countries, providing a straightforward payment process and automated delivery capabilities.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often have hidden charges or slow payment processing. PayPal, for instance, charges high fees for cross-border transactions, while Stripe has a complex fee structure that can be difficult to navigate. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle offers transparent pricing and fast payment processing, with no hidden fees or charges.
PayPal's country restrictions can cripple your digital sales, but the Full Stack Bundle provides a permanent structural alternative.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing crypto-native infrastructure does not mean your buyers need to understand crypto. The Web3 Wallet Connect module generates QR codes for each supported coin, displays live USD-equivalent prices, and guides buyers through the payment flow in plain language. Most buyers complete a crypto payment in under two minutes, even if it is their first time. NOWPayments handles the transaction confirmation and fires the webhook that triggers automated delivery. From the buyer's perspective, they paid and received their product. From your perspective, you received funds in a wallet you control without any platform intermediary between you and your revenue. That is the practical outcome of building on the right infrastructure from the start.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, Stripe has strict requirements for merchants in these countries, making it difficult to use their services. Instead, consider the Full Stack Bundle, which provides a complete store infrastructure and automated delivery capabilities, without any country restrictions or product limitations.
The Full Stack Bundle is the ultimate solution for digital course creators in restricted countries, offering a complete store infrastructure and automated delivery capabilities.
